title: Distribution / Host Integration SSOT: Store Channel Policy

blocks.text: Store channel policy is the C11/C7 boundary where distribution channel facts are reduced into allowed, forbidden, or review-gated host surfaces.

items: `tools/storecontract` generates the policy table from `internal/policy.EvaluateStoreChannelPolicy` and `packaging/store/riido_daemon_store_distribution.riido.json`.
`tools/privacymetadata` generates server-facing metadata boundaries from the privacy metadata allowlist.
`tools/distributionhostdocs` generates this index plus review/demo, open question, and versioning reader docs.
